tasks.brand:upgrade: cp static/branding/upgrade/favicon.svg static/favicon.svg && cp static/branding/upgrade/icon.svg static/icon.svg && cp static/branding/upgrade/icon-512.png static/icon-512.png && cp static/branding/upgrade/icon-192.png static/icon-192.png && cp static/branding/upgrade/apple-touch-icon.png static/apple-touch-icon.png
tasks.brand:production: cp static/branding/production/favicon.svg static/favicon.svg && cp static/branding/production/icon.svg static/icon.svg && cp static/branding/production/icon-512.png static/icon-512.png && cp static/branding/production/icon-192.png static/icon-192.png && cp static/branding/production/apple-touch-icon.png static/apple-touch-icon.png
tasks.mode:upgrade: deno task brand:upgrade && deno task stamp:upgrade && echo 'Mode set to: upgrade'
tasks.mode:production: deno task brand:production && deno task stamp:production && echo 'Mode set to: production'
